message:
fix: WASI fd_readdir/fd_close for /tmp preopen + reuse module-level codecs

- fd_readdir now handles FD_TMP_PREOPEN (was returning EBADF for /tmp)
- fd_close protects FD_TMP_PREOPEN from deletion (was only guarding up
  to FD_DATA_PREOPEN)
- Use consistent mem() helper instead of inline new Uint8Array() in
  fd_fdstat_get, path_filestat_get, fd_filestat_get
- Reuse module-level _encoder/_decoder in python-do.ts run() and
  handleRequest() instead of creating new instances per call
